name: devflows
description: Reusable developer workflows for git publishing, Obsidian wiki lookup, and cleanup reviews.

interface.shortDescription: Reusable workflows for git, wiki, and review cleanup tasks.
interface.longDescription: Reusable developer workflows for fast commit-and-push flows, Obsidian wiki search and reading, and cleanup reviews for active diffs from Codex.
defaultPrompt: Yeet the current repo changes with a commit message.
Search the Obsidian wiki for notes about bulk enrollment.
Read a wiki article and summarize the relevant context.
Review the current diff for duplication, code quality, and efficiency issues, then clean it up.
